member.summary: Reads current object until property name matches or object ends. Case is ignored.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is ']'.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is '}'.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value of numeric type.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is '['.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is '{'.

member.summary: Indicates true if current token is a property value or array value of type string.

member.summary: Specifies input as string.

member.summary: Obtains property name. Advances to the next token.

member.summary: Obtains array or property value as Variant. Advances to the next token.

member.summary: Obtains array or property value as boolean. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to boolean, returns E_FAIL.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.IJSONReader.ReadValueAsDate
member.summary: Obtains property or array value as date. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to datetime, returns E_FAIL.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.IJSONReader.ReadValueAsDouble
member.summary: Obtains property or array value as number. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to double, returns E_FAIL.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.IJSONReader.ReadValueAsLong
member.summary: Obtains property or array value as number. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to long, returns E_FAIL.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.IJSONReader.ReadValueAsString
member.summary: Obtains property or array value as string. Advances to the next token. If property value cannot be coerced to string, returns E_FAIL.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.IJSONReader.SkipUntilObjectEnds
member.summary: Skips the rest of the current object, including closing bracket.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType
member.summary: Esri lock manager types.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrNone
member.summary: 0: No lock.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrRead
member.summary: 1: Read-only lock.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrWrite
member.summary: 2: Write lock. Prevents anyone else from reading or writing to the dataset.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrEdit
member.summary: 3: Edit lock. Will block all edits of the data and prevents anyone from writing to the dataset, allows for read access.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrSchemaRead
member.summary: 4: Schema read lock. Creates a shared read lock. Prevents others from editing the schema of the data such as editing its attributes.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem.esriLockMgrType.esriLockMgrSchemaWrite
member.summary: 5: Schema write lock. Creates an exclusive write lock. Prevents all reads, edits and writes of the data.
